channel.title: NextJS on Hoang
channel.description: Recent content in NextJS on Hoang

item.title: Playaround with NextJS
item.description: Local development in classic mode Follow guide: https://dev.to/codewithveek/how-to-set-up-a-nextjs-project-from-scratch-7p $ node -v v24.2. $ npx create-next-app hoang-nextjs-app $ cd hoang-nextjs-app $ npm run dev > hoang-nextjs-app@0.1.0 dev > next dev ▲ Next.js 16.1.6 (Turbopack) - Local: http://localhost:3000 - Network: http://10.255.255.254:3000 ✓ Starting... Attention: Next.js now collects completely anonymous telemetry regarding usage. This information is used to shape Next.js' roadmap and prioritize features. You can learn more, including how to opt-out if you'd not like to participate in this anonymous program, by visiting the following URL: https://nextjs.
